---
title: "DeepFlow"
subtitle: "Science beneath the surface"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:inline-block; font-size:18px; padding:4px 16px;
    border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.3);
    color:#DDD6FE; margin-bottom:16px; letter-spacing:0.08em;">
    SCIENCE · CODE · INSIGHT
  </div>
  <div style="width:48px; height:3px; background:#8B5CF6;
    margin:0 auto 20px; border-radius:2px;"></div>
  <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; justify-content:center;">
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">Groundwater</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">Geochemistry</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">Hydrology</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">AI & Python</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">MODFLOW</span>
    <span style="font-size:14px; padding:3px 12px; border-radius:999px;
      background:rgba(139,92,246,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.2);
      color:#A78BFA;">PHREEQC</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
<strong>環境問題や水資源</strong>の評価に役立つ地下水・地球化学解析（<strong style="color:#fff; text-shadow: 0 0 1.5px #000, 0 0 2.5px #000;">MODFLOW, PHREEQC</strong>）と、<strong style="color:#fff; text-shadow: 0 0 1.5px #000, 0 0 2.5px #000;">Python・AI</strong>を用いたデータ分析のノウハウを共有します。  

科学・コード・多様な観点で、水の世界を探求するサイトです。

---
